findings.message: Se configuro la cabecera Strict-Transport-Security en vercel.json para forzar conexiones HTTPS durante un ano en produccion.

headers.contentSecurityPolicy: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://challenges.cloudflare.com; frame-src https://challenges.cloudflare.com; connect-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com https://accounts.google.com
